tasks.subject: Create CommissionController with summary and index
tasks.description: Implement CommissionController.php with summary() (FR-007) and index() (FR-006) with role-based filtering.
tasks.evidence: Created CommissionController.php with summary() SUM by status, index() role-based with JOINs

tasks.subject: Implement commission calculate endpoint
tasks.description: Add calculate() to CommissionController per FR-001/002/003/004/005: batch calculation with ClientCommissionRule, skip frozen, setup once, upsert.
tasks.evidence: Added calculate() with ClientCommissionRule lookup, frozen/expired skip, setup once check, ON CONFLICT upsert

tasks.subject: Implement commission pay endpoint
tasks.description: Add pay() to CommissionController per FR-008: mark commission as PAID with paidAt timestamp.
tasks.evidence: Added pay() with status=PAID, paidAt=NOW(), idempotent if already paid

tasks.subject: Register commission routes in index.php
tasks.description: Add 4 commission routes to backend/public/index.php with auth/superadmin middleware.
tasks.evidence: Added 4 routes: GET /summary, GET /commissions, POST /calculate, PUT /:id/pay
